summary: Tested Graupner Suite v36 features: Diverses tab bug fix, new fields in Kunden/Anfragen (Anrede, Vorname, Nachname, Firmenname), file upload for customers, Email inbox, IMAP interval settings. Found and fixed bug in backend AnfrageCreate model missing vorname/nachname/anrede fields.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Backend AnfrageCreate model was missing vorname, nachname, anrede fields - frontend sent these but backend ignored them
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: v36 features fully tested. Bug fixed in /app/backend/routes/anfragen.py - AnfrageCreate and AnfrageUpdate models now include vorname, nachname, anrede fields. create_anfrage function now auto-generates name from vorname+nachname. All features working: Diverses tab loads without crash, Customer modal has new fields (Anrede, Vorname, Nachname, Firmenname for Firma type), file upload section visible (max 10 files, 10MB each), Anfragen modal has new fields, Email inbox shows 2 emails, IMAP interval setting (30 min) visible in Settings > E-Mail tab.

diverses_tab.details: Tab loads without crash, shows Kunden-Status Verwaltung and Diverses/Info sections

customer_new_fields.details: Anrede dropdown, Vorname, Nachname fields visible. Firmenname appears when Firma/Gewerblich type selected

customer_file_upload.details: File upload section visible with 'max 10 Dateien, je 10 MB' label and dropzone

anfragen_new_fields.details: Anrede dropdown, Vorname, Nachname fields visible. Firmenname appears when Firma type selected

imap_interval.details: Auto-Abruf Intervall (Minuten) field visible in Settings > E-Mail, set to 30 minutes

backward_compatibility.details: Existing customers/anfragen with only 'name' field still display correctly

bug_fixed.issue: Backend AnfrageCreate model missing vorname, nachname, anrede fields
bug_fixed.fix: Added vorname, nachname, anrede to AnfrageCreate and AnfrageUpdate models. Updated create_anfrage to store these fields and auto-generate name from vorname+nachname
